procedures.aion_ConfirmLunaReward:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_ConfirmLunaReward]
	@accountId int,
	@keyCount int, 
	@decrease int,
	@remain int
as
begin
	
	declare @currentRemain int	
	declare @currentKey int
	
	set @currentKey = 0
	set @currentRemain = 0
	
	declare @curdate datetime	
	
	set @curdate = dateadd(hour, 9, convert(datetime, convert(date, GETDATE())))
	if @curdate > GETDATE()
		set @curdate = dateadd(day, -1, @curdate)
		
	select @currentRemain = remain_reward, @currentKey = key_count from account_luna_reward where accountId = @accountId and updatedate >= @curdate
	
	if @@ROWCOUNT <=0	-- 무조건 레코드가 있어야 하는 단계이다.
	begin			
		return -3
	end
		
	if (@currentRemain <> @remain)	-- 요청받을 때의 남은 값과 현재 DB의 남은 값이 다르면 처리하면 안됨.
	begin				
		return -1
	end		
		
	if (@currentRemain - @decrease) > 0 --남은 값보다 더 큰 값을 깍으면 안됨.
	begin			
		return -2
	end
	set nocount on	
	update account_luna_reward set key_count = key_Count + @keyCount, remain_reward = @decrease where accountId = @accountId	
	
	set nocount off
	return 0
end
procedures.aion_DecreaseLunaKey:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_DecreaseLunaKey] 
	@accountId int,
	@decreaseKey int
as 
begin

	if @decreaseKey < 0
		return -1	
	
	declare @currentKey int
	
	set @currentKey = 0		
	
	begin tran	
			
	select @currentKey = key_count  from account_luna_reward where accountId = @accountId
			
	if @@ROWCOUNT = 0
	begin
	commit tran
		return -2
	end
	else	
		begin			
			if @currentKey + @decreaseKey < 0 
			begin
				commit tran
				return -3
			end
			
			update account_luna_reward set key_count = key_count - @decreaseKey, updatedate = GETDATE() where accountId = @accountId 
		end		
	commit tran	
	return 0
end

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_DeleteLoginEventInfo]
	@account_id int,
	@event_id int,
	@days int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
    -- Insert statements for procedure here
    IF (@account_id = 0 and @event_id = 0)
    begin
		DELETE FROM user_login_event_data_daily 
		WHERE be_rewarded <> 1 and DATEDIFF(D, recent_count_update_date, GETDATE()) >= @days
		
		DELETE FROM user_login_event_data_other 
		WHERE be_rewarded <> 1 and DATEDIFF(D, recent_count_update_date, GETDATE()) >= @days
	end
	ELSE
    begin
		DELETE FROM user_login_event_data_daily
		WHERE account_id = @account_id and event_id = @event_id and DATEDIFF(D, recent_count_update_date, GETDATE()) >= @days
		
		DELETE FROM user_login_event_data_other
		WHERE account_id = @account_id and event_id = @event_id and DATEDIFF(D, recent_count_update_date, GETDATE()) >= @days
	end
	
	
    RETURN @@rowcount			
END

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_GetBoardBMInfo_2017]
	@accountId int,
	@isSpecial int
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	
    -- Insert statements for procedure here
    declare @maxLevAmongNormalServers int 
    declare @maxLevAmongSpecialServers int
    select @maxLevAmongNormalServers  = MAX(user_level) from global_user_data with (NOLOCK) where account_id = @accountId and is_special_server = 0 and delete_date = 0 group by account_id
    select @maxLevAmongSpecialServers = MAX(user_level) from global_user_data with (NOLOCK) where account_id = @accountId and is_special_server != 0 and delete_date = 0 group by account_id
    
    declare @last_freecharge_time bigint
    declare @free_dice_remain int
    declare @paid_dice_remain int
    declare @paid_reset_remain int
    SELECT 
		@last_freecharge_time = last_freecharge_time, 
		@free_dice_remain = free_dice_remain,
		@paid_dice_remain = paid_dice_remain,
		@paid_reset_remain = paid_reset_remain
	FROM user_board_bm_dice with (NOLOCK)
	WHERE account_id = @accountId
        
    declare @game_id int
    declare @current_pos int
    declare @visited_pos int
    declare @last_reset_time bigint
    SELECT 
		@game_id = game_id,
		@current_pos = current_pos,
		@visited_pos = visited_pos,
		@last_reset_time = last_reset_time
	FROM user_board_bm_game with (NOLOCK)
    WHERE account_id = @accountId and is_special_server = @isSpecial
    
	SELECT 
		ISNULL(@game_id, 0),
		ISNULL(@current_pos, 0),
		ISNULL(@visited_pos, 0),

		ISNULL(@last_freecharge_time, 0),
		ISNULL(@free_dice_remain, 0),

		ISNULL(@paid_reset_remain, 0),
		ISNULL(@maxLevAmongNormalServers, 0),
		ISNULL(@maxLevAmongSpecialServers, 0)

procedures.aion_GetLunaReward:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_GetLunaReward]
	@accountId int
as 
begin 
	set nocount on
	declare @curdate datetime	
	declare @currentReward int, @remainReward int, @keycount int
	declare @updateTime datetime
	set @currentReward = 0
	set @remainReward = 0
	set @keycount = 0
	set @curdate = dateadd(hour, 9, convert(datetime, convert(date, GETDATE())))	
		
	begin tran	
			
	select @currentReward = today_reward, @remainReward = remain_reward, @keycount = key_count, @updateTime = updatedate from account_luna_reward where accountId = @accountId
			
	if @@ROWCOUNT = 0 
		begin 			
			set @currentReward = 0
			set @remainReward = 0
			set @keycount = 0
			insert into account_luna_reward (accountId, today_reward, remain_reward, key_count) values (@accountid, @currentReward, @remainReward, @keycount)			
		end
	else	
		begin
			if getdate() > @curdate and @updateTime <= @curdate	--날짜가 오늘의 초기화 시간 이전 값이라면			
			begin 				
				set @currentReward = 0
				set @remainReward = 0
				update account_luna_reward set today_reward = @currentReward, remain_reward = @remainReward, updatedate = GETDATE() where accountId = @accountid
			end		
		end		
	commit tran		
	set nocount off
	select isnull(@currentReward, 0), isnull(@remainReward, 0), isnull(@keycount,0)	
End

procedures.aion_GetPlayTimesForPolls:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_GetPlayTimesForPolls]
	@pollIds	NVARCHAR(MAX),
	@account_id	INT
as
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	DECLARE @S_VAL NVARCHAR(MAX)
	DECLARE @S_SPLIT_CHAR NVARCHAR(1)
	DECLARE @oPos INT, @nPos INT, @i INT
	DECLARE @tempVar NVARCHAR(4000)
	DECLARE @T_SPLIT TABLE(
		NUM INT, 
		VAL NVARCHAR(4000)
	)
	DECLARE @PollIDList TABLE(poll_id INT)

	BEGIN
		SET @S_VAL = @pollIds
		SET @S_SPLIT_CHAR = N','
		SET @oPos = 1
		SET @nPos = 1
		SET @i = 0

		WHILE(@nPos > 0)
		BEGIN
			SET @nPos = CHARINDEX(@S_SPLIT_CHAR, @S_VAL, @oPos)
		
			IF @nPos = 0
				SET @tempVar = RIGHT(@S_VAL, LEN(@S_VAL) - @oPos + 1)
			ELSE
				SET @tempVar = SUBSTRING(@S_VAL, @oPos, @nPos - @oPos)

			IF LEN(@tempVar) > 0
			INSERT INTO @T_SPLIT VALUES (@i, @tempVar)

			SET @oPos = @nPos + 1
			SET @i = @i + 1
		END

		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO @PollIDList SELECT CONVERT(INT, VAL) FROM @T_SPLIT
		END
	END

	SELECT templete.poll_id, ISNULL(app.previous_playtime, 0) as previous_playtime FROM @PollIDList AS templete
	LEFT JOIN account_playtime_polls AS app ON app.poll_id = templete.poll_id AND app.account_id = @account_id
END

procedures.aion_PutUserDataFromAllServer:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_PutUserDataFromAllServer] 
	@db_userId	nvarchar(64),
	@db_passwd	nvarchar(64)
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;


	declare @server_id int 
	declare @sync_server_id int
	declare @ret int

	declare syncChar_cursor cursor for select server_id from aion_serverlist
	open syncChar_cursor
	fetch next from syncChar_cursor into @sync_server_id

	while @@fetch_status = 0
	begin
		SET @ret = -10000
		exec aion_PutUserDataFromServer @db_userId, @db_passwd, @sync_server_id, @ret output

		update aion_serverlist set update_result = @ret where server_id = @sync_server_id


		fetch next from syncChar_cursor into @sync_server_id
	end

	close syncChar_cursor
	deallocate syncChar_cursor

END
procedures.aion_PutUserDataFromServer:
/*
Return 결과
	:

*/

-- =============================================
-- Author:		<Author,,Name>
-- Create date: <Create Date,,>
-- Description:	<Description,,>
-- =============================================
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_PutUserDataFromServer] 
	@db_userId	nvarchar(64),
	@db_passwd	nvarchar(64),
	@serverId int,
	@ret	int	output
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	declare @serverName  nvarchar(128)
	set @serverName = ''
	declare @databaseName  nvarchar(64)
	set @databaseName = ''
	select @serverName = datasource, @databaseName = database_name from aion_serverlist where server_id = @serverId
	if @@rowcount = 0
	begin
		set @ret = -1	-- DB에 대한 정보가 없음
		return
	end

	declare @db_info nvarchar(256)
	set @db_info = '''' + @serverName + ''';''' + @db_userId + ''';''' + @db_passwd + ''''


	declare @sql	nvarchar(4000)


	-- 없는 유저 정보 acc db에 입력
	set @sql = 'insert into global_user_data('
				+ ' char_id, account_id, create_date, last_login_time, last_logout_time, delete_date, delete_completed_date, user_level, server_id'
				+ ') '
				+ ' select '
				+ ' o.char_id, o.account_id, o.create_date, o.last_login_time, o.last_logout_time, o.delete_date, o.delete_complete_date, o.lev, '
				+ ' ' + cast(@serverId as nvarchar) 
				+ ' from openrowset (''SQLOLEDB'', ' + @db_info + ','
				+ ' ''select char_id, account_id, lev, create_date, last_login_time, last_logout_time, delete_date, delete_complete_date from ' + @databaseName + '.dbo.user_data '' ) as o'

procedures.aion_QueryCanCreateJumpingCharacter:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_QueryCanCreateJumpingCharacter]
	@account_id int,
	@server_id int,					-- 특정서버에서 생성 가능한가
	@from_special tinyint,			-- 일반서버군/스페셜서버군 에서 조건체크할 것인가
	
	@can_create_num int output,		-- 만들 수 있는 점핑 캐릭터 수
	@satisfy_date tinyint output,
	@satisfy_char_lev tinyint output
AS
BEGIN
	-- SET NOCOUNT ON added to prevent extra result sets from
	-- interfering with SELECT statements.
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
    -- Insert statements for procedure here
    declare @cur_date datetime
    set @cur_date = getdate()
    
    declare @max_creation_count int
    declare @required_char_level int
    declare @start_date datetime
    declare @end_date datetime
    SELECT @max_creation_count = max_creation_count, @required_char_level = required_char_level, @start_date = start_date, @end_date = end_date
    FROM jumping_character_config(nolock) WHERE server_id = @server_id and start_date < @cur_date and @cur_date < end_date and is_deleted = 0
    
    IF (ISNULL(@max_creation_count, 0) > 0)
	begin
		set @satisfy_date = 1;
		-- 요구하는 레벨의 캐릭터가 있는지 검사		
		IF (EXISTS(SELECT char_id FROM global_user_data(nolock) WHERE account_id = @account_id and is_special_server = @from_special and user_level >= @required_char_level and delete_completed_date = 0)
			OR @required_char_level = 0) -- 0인경우 캐릭터 레벨 조건을 요구하지 않음
		begin
			set @satisfy_char_lev = 1;
			-- 해당 기간에 이미 점핑 캐릭터를 몇개 만들었는지를 가져옴
			declare @cur_creation_num int
			SELECT @cur_creation_num = COUNT(*)
			FROM global_user_data(nolock)
			WHERE account_id = @account_id and is_special_server = @from_special and create_date > @start_date and create_date < @end_date and is_jumping_character != 0
			
			set @cur_creation_num = ISNULL(@cur_creation_num, 0)
			set @can_create_num = @max_creation_count - @cur_creation_num
		end
		ELSE
		begin
			set @satisfy_char_lev = 0
			set @can_create_num = 0
		end
	end
    ELSE
	begin
		set @satisfy_date = 0
		set @satisfy_char_lev = 0
		set @can_create_num = 0
    end
END

procedures.aion_ResetLunaReward:
create procedure [dbo].[aion_ResetLunaReward] 
	@accountId int	
as 
begin
	declare @currentReward int, @remainReward int
	declare @updateTime datetime
	set @currentReward = 0
	set @remainReward = 0
	
	declare @curdate datetime
	set @curdate = dateadd(hour, 9, convert(datetime, convert(date, GETDATE())))
		
	begin tran	
			
	select @currentReward = today_reward, @remainReward = remain_reward, @updateTime = updatedate from account_luna_reward where accountId = @accountId
			
	if @@ROWCOUNT <> 0 			
		begin
			if getdate() > @curdate and  @updateTime <= @curdate	--오늘 데이터가 유효한 경우 현재값에 더한다. 아니면 위에서 받은 값으로 덮어쓴다.
			begin 
				set @currentReward = 0
				set @remainReward = 0
				update account_luna_reward set today_reward = @currentReward, remain_reward = @remainReward, updatedate = GETDATE() where accountId = @accountId 
			end					
		end		
	commit tran	
	return 0
end

procedures.aion_UpdateLuna:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_UpdateLuna]
	@accId int, 
	@deltaLuna bigint
as
begin
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	begin tran
	declare @currentLuna bigint
	set @currentLuna = 0
	select @currentLuna = isnull(luna,0) from account_luna where accountId = @accId
	
	if (@currentLuna + @deltaLuna) < 0 
	begin
		commit tran
		SET NOCOUNT OFF;
		return -2
	end
	else
	begin
		
		update account_luna set luna = luna + @deltaLuna, updatedate = GETDATE() where accountId = @accId
		if @@ROWCOUNT = 0
		begin
			insert into account_luna (accountId, luna) values (@accId, @deltaLuna)
		end
		
	end
	commit tran
	SET NOCOUNT OFF;
	return 0
end
procedures.aion_UpdateLunaPrice:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_UpdateLunaPrice]
	@char_id int,
	@luna_id int,
	@use_count int,
	@reset_type tinyint,
	@reset_week_value tinyint,
	@reset_time_value int,
	@create_time bigint
as
begin	
	begin tran
	if @use_count = 0 and @create_time = 0	--지우는 경우다.
	begin
		update user_luna_price set use_count = @use_count, create_time = @create_time where char_id = @char_id and luna_id = @luna_id
	end
	else	-- 일반 업데이트인데
	begin
		update user_luna_price set use_count = @use_count, update_time = GETDATE() where char_id = @char_id and luna_id = @luna_id and create_time != 0 -- 정상적인 상황에 대해서 시도해보고
		
		if @@ROWCOUNT = 0 --실패라면 일단 지워짐 표시된 (create_time이 0인 레코드) 경우를 업데이트 시도.
		begin
			update user_luna_price set use_count = @use_count, update_time = GETDATE(), create_time = @create_time where char_id = @char_id and luna_id = @luna_id and create_time = 0
			if @@ROWCOUNT = 0 -- 그래도 없으면 인서트.
			begin
				insert into user_luna_price (char_id, luna_id, use_count, reset_type, reset_week_value, reset_time_value, create_time)
				values (@char_id, @luna_id, @use_count, @reset_type, @reset_week_value, @reset_time_value, @create_time)
			end
		end	
	end
	commit tran
end
procedures.aion_UpdateLunaReward:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_UpdateLunaReward] 
	@accountId int,
	@reward_point int
as 
begin
	declare @currentReward int, @remainReward int
	declare @updateTime datetime
	set @currentReward = 0
	set @remainReward = 0
	
	declare @curdate datetime
	set @curdate = dateadd(hour, 9, convert(datetime, convert(date, GETDATE())))

	if @reward_point < 0
		return -1
		
	begin tran	
			
	select @currentReward = today_reward, @remainReward = remain_reward, @updateTime = updatedate from account_luna_reward where accountId = @accountId
			
	if @@ROWCOUNT = 0 
		begin 			
			set @currentReward = @reward_point
			set @remainReward = @reward_point
			insert into account_luna_reward (accountId, today_reward, remain_reward) values (@accountid, @currentReward, @remainReward)
		end
	else	
		begin
			if getdate() > @curdate and  @updateTime <= @curdate	--오늘 데이터가 유효한 경우 현재값에 더한다. 아니면 위에서 받은 값으로 덮어쓴다.
			begin 
				set @currentReward = @reward_point
				set @remainReward = @reward_point				
			end
			else
			begin
				set @currentReward = @currentReward + @reward_point
				set @remainReward = @remainReward
			end
			update account_luna_reward set today_reward = @currentReward, remain_reward = @remainReward, updatedate = GETDATE() where accountId = @accountId 
		end		
	commit tran	
	return 0
end
procedures.aion_UpdatePlayTimeForPoll:
CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[aion_UpdatePlayTimeForPoll]
	@poll_id		INT,
	@account_id		INT,
	@play_time		BIGINT
	
AS
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;

	DECLARE @current_playtime BIGINT
	SET @current_playtime = 0

	BEGIN TRAN

	SELECT @current_playtime = previous_playtime
	FROM account_playtime_polls (nolock)
	WHERE poll_id = @poll_id AND account_id = @account_id

	IF @@ROWCOUNT = 0
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO account_playtime_polls (account_id, poll_id, previous_playtime)
			VALUES (@account_id, @poll_id, @play_time)
		END
	ELSE
		BEGIN
			UPDATE account_playtime_polls
			SET previous_playtime += @play_time
			WHERE poll_id = @poll_id AND account_id = @account_id
		END
	COMMIT TRAN

	SELECT ISNULL(previous_playtime, 0) as previous_playtime
	FROM account_playtime_polls (nolock)
	WHERE poll_id = @poll_id AND account_id = @account_id
END
procedures.aion_UpdatePlayTimesForPolls:
CREATE procedure [dbo].[aion_UpdatePlayTimesForPolls]
	@pollIds	NVARCHAR(MAX),
	@playTimes	NVARCHAR(MAX),
	@account_id	INT
as
BEGIN
	SET NOCOUNT ON;
	DECLARE @S_VAL NVARCHAR(MAX)
    DECLARE @S_VAL_TIME NVARCHAR(MAX)
    DECLARE @S_SPLIT_CHAR NVARCHAR(1)
    DECLARE @oPos INT, @nPos INT, @oPos_t INT, @nPos_t INT, @i INT
    DECLARE @tempVar NVARCHAR(4000), @tempVar_t NVARCHAR(4000)
    DECLARE @tempPollId INT
    DECLARE @tempPlayTime BIGINT

    SET @S_VAL = @pollIds
    SET @S_VAL_TIME = @playTimes
    SET @S_SPLIT_CHAR = N','
    SET @oPos = 1
    SET @oPos_t = 1
    SET @nPos = 1
    SET @nPos_t = 1

    DECLARE @PollIDTimeList TABLE
    (
            poll_id INT,
            PlayTime BIGINT 
    )

    WHILE(@nPos > 0 AND @nPos_t > 0)
		BEGIN
			SET @nPos = CHARINDEX(@S_SPLIT_CHAR, @S_VAL, @oPos)
			SET @nPos_t = CHARINDEX(@S_SPLIT_CHAR, @S_VAL_TIME, @oPos_t)
               
			IF @nPos = 0
				BEGIN
						SET @tempVar = RIGHT(@S_VAL, LEN(@S_VAL) - @oPos + 1)
				END
			ELSE
				BEGIN
						SET @tempVar = SUBSTRING(@S_VAL, @oPos, @nPos - @oPos)
				END

			IF @nPos_t = 0
				BEGIN
						SET @tempVar_t = RIGHT(@S_VAL_TIME, LEN(@S_VAL_TIME) - @oPos_t + 1)
				END
			ELSE
				BEGIN
						SET @tempVar_t = SUBSTRING(@S_VAL_TIME, @oPos_t, @nPos_t - @oPos_t)
				END

			IF LEN(@tempVar) > 0 AND LEN(@tempVar_t) > 0
				BEGIN
						SET @tempPollId = CONVERT(INT, @tempVar)
						SET @tempPlayTime = CONVERT(INT, @tempVar_t)

						INSERT INTO @PollIDTimeList VALUES (@tempPollId, @tempPlayTime)                 
				END

			SET @oPos = @nPos + 1
			SET @oPos_t = @nPos_t + 1
		END

	IF @nPos = 0 AND @nPos_t = 0
		BEGIN
			MERGE account_playtime_polls AS app
			USING @PollIDTimeList AS pitl
					ON (app.account_id = @account_id AND app.poll_id = pitl.poll_id)
			WHEN MATCHED THEN
					UPDATE SET app.previous_playtime = app.previous_playtime + pitl.PlayTime
			WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
					INSERT VALUES (@account_id, pitl.poll_id, pitl.PlayTime);
			RETURN 0
		END
	ELSE
		RETURN -1

END

procedures.GM_AccountCacheDA_SrchHiddenFatigueList:
CREATE PROC [dbo].[GM_AccountCacheDA_SrchHiddenFatigueList]
	@world_id			int,
	@last_login_date	varchar(24)
AS
	set nocount on
	set transaction isolation level read uncommitted

	SELECT	a.account_id, hidden_fatigue_point, hidden_fatigue_updatetime, hidden_fatigue_npckill, u.last_login_time, u.char_id, u.server_id
	FROM	account_data a (nolock)
	JOIN
	(
		SELECT	account_id, char_id, last_login_time, server_id, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by account_id order by last_login_time desc) as LOGIN_TIME_ROWNUM
		FROM	global_user_data (nolock)
		WHERE	server_id = @world_id
		AND		last_login_time >= CONVERT(datetime, @last_login_date)
	) u ON a.account_id = u.account_id AND u.LOGIN_TIME_ROWNUM = 1
	ORDER BY account_id DESC

procedures.GM_LunaInfoListDA_DecreaseLunaAmount:
CREATE PROC [dbo].[GM_LunaInfoListDA_DecreaseLunaAmount] 
	@accountId int,
	@decreaseLunaAmount bigint
AS

BEGIN
	IF @decreaseLunaAmount > 0
		BEGIN
			UPDATE account_luna 
			SET luna = luna - @decreaseLunaAmount, updatedate = GETDATE() 
			WHERE accountId = @accountId AND luna >= @decreaseLunaAmount
		END
END
